(base) tio_nekton4@ubuntu:~$ python - <<'PY'
import pandas as pd

path = "/mnt/disk3/tio_nekton4/EvolvePro/data/exp/Evolution_Summary_Data.xlsx"
xls = pd.ExcelFile(path)

print("SHEETS:")
for s in xls.sheet_names:
    print("-", s)

for s in xls.sheet_names[:5]:
    print(f"\n=== {s} ===")
    df = pd.read_excel(path, sheet_name=s)
    print("columns:", list(df.columns))
    print(df.head(5).to_string())
PY
SHEETS:
- C143
- CD71
- Cas12f
- Bxb1
- T7 pol
- MLV
